zh.lifeSummary: 當Floris Van Lijnden於1150年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德布倫連登時，他的父親Willem van Lijnden27歲，母親Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard22歲。他於1165年與Agnes Van Este Van Wachtendonck在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德連登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1203年9月16日在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Floris Van Lijnden于1150年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德布倫連登时，他的父亲Willem van Lijnden27岁，母亲Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard22岁。他于1165年与Agnes Van Este Van Wachtendonck在荷兰蓋爾德藍德連登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1203年9月16日在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Lijnden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): plural form of   Linde  .
Flemish and Dutch (Van Linden): habitational name from any of the places called Linden or Lienden in Brabant and North Brabant.
Flemish and Dutch: shortened form of   Vanderlinden  .

variants.name: Linde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels, Gunner, Lars.  German Kurt, Dieter, Erna, Fritz, Hasso, Markus, Otto, Ralf.

German, Dutch, and Scandinavian: topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous lime tree, Middle High German, Dutch linde, Scandinavian lind. There are several places, especially in northern Germany, named with this word, and the name may be a habitational name from any of these. The word was also used in a number of Old High German women's personal names, with the meaning ‘shield’ or ‘spear’ (these being made from the hard wood of the lime); it is possible that the surname in some cases is from a short form of one of these. As a Swedish name it is often ornamental rather than topographic. Compare Lindy .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of German Linde ‘lime tree’ (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Floris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a personal name derived from Latin flos, genitive floris ‘flower’.
Greek: derivative of Floros , or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name, such as Florakis.

variants.name: Flore
meanings: Name borne in Roman mythology by the goddess of flowers and the spring (a derivative of Latin flos ‘flower’, genitive floris). It is also the feminine form of the old Roman family name Florus, likewise derived from flos. Flora was little used in England before the 18th century, when it was imported from Scotland. In 1746 Flora Macdonald ( 1722–90 ) of Milton in South Uist helped Bonnie Prince Charlie to escape from there to the Island of Skye, disguised as a woman, after his defeat at Culloden. In fact, Flora was merely an Anglicized form of her Gaelic name, Fionnaghal, a variant of Fionnguala ( see Fionnuala ). However, her fame made the name Flora popular in the Highlands and elsewhere.

en.lifeSummary: When Floris Van Lijnden was born in 1150, in Lienden, Buren, Gelderland, Netherlands, his father, Willem van Lijnden, was 27 and his mother, Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard, was 22. He married Agnes Van Este Van Wachtendonck in 1165, in Lienden, Gelderland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 16 September 1203, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Floris Van Lijnden est né en 1150, à Lienden, Buren, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Willem van Lijnden, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Van Este Van Wachtendonck en 1165, à Lienden, Gueldre, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1203, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Floris Van Lijnden 1150 in Lienden, Buren, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Willem van Lijnden 27 und seine Mutter Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard 22. Er hat 1165 in Lienden, Geldern, Niederlande Agnes Van Este Van Wachtendonck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 16. September 1203 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Floris Van Lijnden è nato il nel 1150 nel Lienden, Buren, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Willem van Lijnden, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Van Este Van Wachtendonck nel 1165, nel Lienden, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 settembre 1203, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Floris Van Lijndenが1150年にオランダジェルダーランドブレンリーンデンで生まれた時，父Willem van Lijndenは27歳，母Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliardは22歳であった。1165年にオランダジェルダーランドリーンデンでAgnes Van Este Van Wachtendonckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1203年9月16日に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Floris Van Lijnden(이)가 1150년 네덜란드 글델랜드 버 리든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Willem van Lijnden(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1165년 네덜란드 글델랜드 리든에서 Agnes Van Este Van Wachtendonck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1203년 9월 16일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Floris Van Lijnden nasceu em 1150, em Lienden, Buren, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Willem van Lijnden, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Van Este Van Wachtendonck em 1165, em Lienden, Gheldria, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1203, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Floris Van Lijnden родился в 1150 г. в местности лиенден, бурен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Willem van Lijnden было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Van Este Van Wachtendonck в 1165 г. в местности лиенден, джелдирланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 16 сентября 1203 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Floris Van Lijnden nació en 1150, en Lienden, Buren, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Willem van Lijnden, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Agnes Van Este Van Wachtendonck en 1165, en Lienden, Gelderland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1203, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
